name: Potato and Carrot Medley
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup green pepper strips, half the length of the strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a pot.
2. Add chicken bouillon and dill weed to the melted butter. Stir well.
3. Add carrots, potatoes, and onions to the pot. Cook for a few minutes on medium-low heat.
4. Add all other ingredients (green pepper strips and green beans) to the pot.
5. Continue cooking until all vegetables are done.
